scripts.build: cleancss -o css/global.min.css css/global.css && terser js/site.js -o js/site.min.js -c -m
scripts.build:vercel: npm run generate-header-logo && npm run build && node scripts/rewrite-html-for-prod.js
scripts.test: node scripts/test-url-encoder-decoder.js && node scripts/test-csv-column-remover.js && node scripts/test-csv-column-splitter.js && node scripts/test-csv-column-joiner.js && node scripts/test-csv-deduplicator.js && node scripts/test-csv-sorter.js && node scripts/test-csv-row-filter.js
